data.description:
Testing mode: GREEN

After task a212-9cff RED tests exist and fail, implement overlay dispatch in plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh:

1. After the tier review curl completes (after line writing reviewer-findings.json), source WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/overlay-flags.env to read _SEC, _PERF, _TQ.
2. Launch parallel background curl jobs for each active flag:
   - security_overlay=true → curl with system prompt from $_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md; write response text to $WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR/reviewer-findings-security-red.json (raw LLM text, fence-stripped).
   - performance_overlay=true → curl with code-reviewer-performance.md; write to reviewer-findings-performance.json.
   - test_quality_overlay=true → curl with code-reviewer-test-quality.md; write to reviewer-findings-test-quality.json.
3. wait for all background jobs before proceeding (bash background jobs + wait pattern; do not use subagents).
4. After parallel jobs complete: if security_overlay was true, dispatch a serial curl for code-reviewer-security-blue-team.md (reads reviewer-findings-security-red.json as prior context); write to reviewer-findings-security-blue.json.

Done criteria: all RED tests from a212-9cff now pass; existing 22 tests still pass.

Files touched: plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh
data.title: GREEN: implement overlay parallel dispatch in ci-llm-review-runner.sh
